testcase.name: checkpoint.model
testcase.system-out: Model state is present Expected=present; actual=present.

testcase.name: checkpoint.trainer-state
testcase.system-out: Trainer state is present Expected=present; actual=present.

testcase.name: checkpoint.optimizer
testcase.system-out: Optimizer state is present Expected=present; actual=present.

testcase.name: checkpoint.scheduler
testcase.system-out: Scheduler state is present Expected=present; actual=present.

testcase.name: checkpoint.rng
testcase.system-out: RNG state is present Expected=present; actual=present.

testcase.name: process.real-termination
testcase.system-out: Checkpoint worker was really terminated Expected=verified nonzero exit; actual=verified=True, exit=1.

testcase.name: process.distinct-recovery
testcase.system-out: Recovery ran in a new process Expected=distinct PIDs; actual=32392 -> 17736.

testcase.name: progress.global-step
testcase.system-out: Recovered global step matches control Expected=8; actual=8.

testcase.name: trajectory.loss-history
testcase.system-out: Loss history exactly matches control Expected=exact control loss history; actual=exact match.

testcase.name: state.trainable
testcase.system-out: Trainable state digest exactly matches control Expected=834764124dbded98a265dfc56aa6b0f3489d55cb121bc3f870c35aa0ec7f1cc3; actual=834764124dbded98a265dfc56aa6b0f3489d55cb121bc3f870c35aa0ec7f1cc3.
